results.title: Berkshire Hathaway Q3 2025: Operating Earnings $14.5 Billion; Cash Reaches Record $325 Billion
results.snippet: Berkshire Hathaway reported Q3 2025 operating earnings of $14.5 billion, up 6% year-over-year. Insurance underwriting profit was $1.8 billion, and GEICO auto insurance continued its earnings recovery. Berkshire's cash and US Treasury bill holdings reached a record $325 billion, as Warren Buffett has been a net seller of equities for eight consecutive quarters. The Apple stake was trimmed further to approximately $70 billion.

results.title: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Invests in Japan's Five Major Trading Houses; Stake Exceeds $20 Billion
results.snippet: Berkshire Hathaway's combined stake in Japan's five major trading houses — Itochu, Marubeni, Mitsubishi, Mitsui, and Sumitomo — has grown to over $20 billion as of Q3 2025. Berkshire issued yen-denominated bonds to fund the position. Warren Buffett described the Japanese sogo shosha as 'surprisingly undervalued businesses with durable competitive advantages.' The investments have returned over 180% since their 2019-2020 initial disclosure.

results.title: Berkshire Hathaway Energy Faces Wildfire Liabilities; Management Restructures Subsidiary
results.snippet: Berkshire Hathaway Energy (BHE), the utility holding company, faces over $15 billion in wildfire-related claims in Oregon and California. To ring-fence the liability, Berkshire restructured BHE as a standalone subsidiary with its own capital structure. This change reduced BHE's contribution to Berkshire's consolidated book value. The situation is considered manageable given Berkshire's $325 billion cash reserve.
